title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.280 - Budget submitted to legislature within thirty days
text:
33.280.  Budget submitted to legislature within thirty days. — The budget shall be submitted to the general assembly within thirty days after the general assembly convenes in each regular session.  Copies of the budget shall be available for public distribution.
(RSMo 1939 § 10903, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 56)
